who: restaurant kitchen managers in fast-casual dining establishments
offer: For restaurant kitchen managers in fast-casual dining establishments processing 5–15 shifts/day, inconsistent compliance logging causes potential food safety violations. We generate automated daily shift compliance logs instead of manual logging on paper or spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent compliance logging leads to potential food safety violations.
